title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Lists Demands That Trump Deemed ‘Unacceptable’
summary_full: Tehran said its conditions for a peace deal include U.S. war reparations, recognition of its sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and an end to American sanctions, Iranian state media reported.
summary_public: Tehran said its conditions for a peace deal include U.S. war reparations, recognition of its sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and an end to American sanctions, Iranian state media reported.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Lists Demands That Trump Deemed ‘Unacceptable’
